text: Nuno role-search expanded from 32 employers / 3 profile buckets (hotel/qc/sales) to 110 employers / 10 buckets (hotel, hotel-fb, hotel-fo, tourism, qc, qc-supplier, sales, sales-account, training, ops). Largest buckets: ops=21, sales=17, hotel=16, qc=15. Generated via MimicClaude (clone-agent task 83386af88212, Qwen3.6, 24211 tokens, 6012 reasoning). Job-boards searches grew 12 -> 37 incl. 30-day freshness filters (Indeed fromage=30, LinkedIn f_TPR=r2592000) for all 10 buckets.

JSON-array-salvage pattern for truncated airouter responses: $emStart = $text.IndexOf([, $text.IndexOf(arrayKey)); $body = $text.Substring($emStart+1); $lastClose = $body.LastIndexOf(},); $valid = $body.Substring(0, $lastClose+1); $reconstructed = { arrayKey: [ $valid ] }; ConvertFrom-Json. Recovered 110 of ~120 employer objects from a response that hit the 16384-token completion ceiling mid-entry.

Stage-then-zip pattern for OneDrive trees with Office files possibly open: copy each source file to $env:TEMP staging via [System.IO.File]::Open(path, Open, Read, FileShare.ReadWrite); files held exclusively by Word/Excel still fail (catch, log, continue); then [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::CreateFromDirectory(stage, zip, Optimal, false). Replaces Compress-Archive which (a) spams hundreds of progress-bar stderr lines polluting agent transcripts, (b) opens sources without FileShare and aborts the whole archive at the first locked file leaving a 0-byte zip.

refs.script: ad-hoc stage-then-zip; embed in next pack-build script

text: Day total airouter spend (2026-05-25, Qwen3.6 via FLYING -> clone-agent -> CHost worker): 21 calls, ~190k total tokens (165566 from first 20 calls + 24211 for roles-expand). Hidden reasoning was 72-85 percent of completion tokens across the day. Top tag of the day: mimic-claude-nuno-roles-expand (24211 tok). MimicClaude empirical sweet-spot for structured JSON output: prompt 1-5k, MaxTokens 16384; below 8k MaxTokens reasoning eats the whole budget and visible text is empty.

Nuno job-hunt pack v2 delivered (zip 650558 B, 30 entries) - replaces v1 (675572 B, 32 entries). Delta: v2 carries the 110-employer nuno-roles-expanded.xlsx; missed 3 entries because user had nuno-roles.xlsx (old 32-row) open in Excel PID 14056 and pt/linkedin-guide-pt.docx + pt/reclet-pt.docx open in Word PID 7812. PDFs of both docx are still in the zip. User declined the weekly scheduled refresh of nuno-roles.xlsx on CHost - will request on-demand. Pending optional: (a) close Word/Excel and rebuild zip to capture last 3 files; (b) MimicClaude follow-up for 1-line why-this-fits-Nuno notes per employer.
